title: Pup Go Toddler First Remote Control Car Age 2 3, Radio Police Racing Cars Toys with Music and Lights, Gifts for Kids, Birthday Present Gift For 2 3 Year Old Boys(2 dolls)

🚓 play cheerful music while the headlights blink. Perfect for 2 year old boys and girls, this engaging toy promotes sensory play and is a great gift for birthdays or holidays

Whether it's a police car for age 2 kids or a classic blue toy car, our remote control vehicles are sure to delight. 🚓 Toy Car Size: 13.5 x 10 x 11 cm (5.3" x 3.9" x 4.3"). Race car needs 3 AA batteries (not included), remote control needs 2 AA batteries (not included)

description: Product description About Pup Go Services We look forward to send your kids the in gadgets, toys, and cool gift ideas just like for our kids. We're not just satisfied with great products at prices, but pride ourselves on great customer service as well. All our products are backed 180 day refund and replacement guarantee . Description This RC cartoon car is bright, colorful and perfect for young kids learning to play with remote control toys for the first time. Simple design of the remote control, only two large buttons, easy to learn , you can enhance baby's self-confidence. Cool sound and light experience more realistic, full of fun. Full curved design, 360° corners, full protection for baby's safety and health. The antenna uses a special soft material , super flexible, with a round hat; double protection to avoid hurt the baby. Lovely cartoon remote control car is a cool car with wonderful music and exciting light ! By pressing driver's head or the light, comes a lovely sound. Every action is accompanied by cool lighting and music.
